posts.text: Maruti Suzuki - Q4 and FY 26 results and concall highlights - Q4 outcomes - Revenues - 50078 vs 38839 cr, up 28 pc EBITDA - 6156 vs 4842 cr, up 27 pc Other income - 1583 vs 581 cr PAT - 3590 vs 3857 cr, down 7 pc Sales volume @ 6.76 vs 6.04 lakh vehicles, up 11.5 pc Mini + Compact, UV segments grew by (-) 4 pc and 15 pc respectively. LCVs grew by 10 pc FY 26 outcomes - Revenues - 1.74 vs 1.45 lakh cr, up 20 pc EBITDA - 21405 vs 20149 cr, up 7 pc Other income - 4643 vs 5199 cr PAT - 14454 vs 14296 cr, up 1 pc Sales volumes @ 24.22 vs 22.34 lakh vehicles, up 8.5 pc Mini + Compact segment, UVs gr…
